translations.pt: Meu avô vem hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Ông tôi sẽ đến tối nay.
translations.hi: मेरे दादाजी आज रात आ रहे हैं.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular; modifies 'grand-père' (agrees with the noun).
Common noun, masculine; head of the NP 'Mon grand-père'; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject.
Demonstrative determiner used with a time noun; modifies 'soir'.
Common noun, masculine; forms the temporal expression 'ce soir' functioning as a time adjunct.

sentences.target: Je téléphone à mon grand-père le matin.
sentences.reading: /ʒə telefɔn a mɔ̃ ɡʁɑ̃ pɛʁ lə matɛ̃/

translations.fr: Je téléphone à mon grand-père le matin.
translations.ipa: /ʒə telefɔn a mɔ̃ ɡʁɑ̃ pɛʁ lə matɛ̃/
translations.en: I call my grandfather in the morning.
translations.es: Llamo a mi abuelo por la mañana.
translations.de: Ich rufe meinen Großvater morgens an.
translations.pt: Eu ligo para o meu avô de manhã.
translations.vi: Tôi gọi cho ông tôi vào buổi sáng.
translations.hi: मैं सुबह अपने दादाजी को फोन करता हूँ.
translations.el: Τηλεφωνώ στον παππού μου το πρωί.
translations.nb: Jeg ringer til bestefaren min om morgenen.
translations.id: Saya menelepon kakek saya pada pagi hari.
translations.sv: Jag ringer min morfar på morgonen.
translations.ro: Îl sun pe bunicul meu dimineața.
translations.da: Jeg ringer til min bedstefar om morgenen.
translations.ja: 朝に祖父に電話します。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'téléphone'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes a recipient introduced by 'à'.
Simple preposition introducing the indirect object/recipient.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular; modifies 'grand-père'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'à' (recipient).
Definite article, masculine singular; modifies 'matin'.
Common noun; time expression 'le matin' functioning as a habitual time adjunct.

sentences.target: Nos enfants visitent leur grand-père demain.
sentences.reading: /no zɑ̃fɑ̃ vizit lœʁ ɡʁɑ̃ pɛʁ dœmɛ̃/

translations.fr: Nos enfants visitent leur grand-père demain.
translations.ipa: /no zɑ̃fɑ̃ vizit lœʁ ɡʁɑ̃ pɛʁ dœmɛ̃/
translations.en: Our children are visiting their grandfather tomorrow.
translations.es: Nuestros hijos visitan a su abuelo mañana.
translations.de: Unsere Kinder besuchen morgen ihren Großvater.
translations.it: I nostri figli vanno a trovare il loro nonno domani.
translations.ko: 우리 아이들은 내일 할아버지를 만나러 가요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的孩子明天去看他们的爷爷。
translations.yue: 我哋啲小朋友聽日去探佢哋嘅阿爺。
translations.ru: Наши дети завтра навестят своего дедушку.
translations.pt: Nossos filhos vão visitar o avô deles amanhã.
translations.he: הילדים שלנו מבקרים את סבא שלהם מחר.
translations.vi: Các con chúng tôi sẽ đi thăm ông ngày mai.
translations.nl: Onze kinderen bezoeken morgen hun opa.
translations.uk: Наші діти завтра навідають свого дідуся.
translations.hi: हमारे बच्चे कल अपने दादाजी से मिलने जा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Nasze dzieci jutro odwiedzą swojego dziadka.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά μας θα επισκεφθούν τον παππού τους αύριο.
translations.nb: Barna våre skal besøke bestefaren sin i morgen.
translations.id: Anak-anak kami akan mengunjungi kakek mereka besok.
translations.sv: Våra barn besöker sin morfar i morgon.
translations.ro: Copiii noștri își θαρ vizita bunicul mâine.
translations.cs: Naše děti zítra navštíví svého dědečka.
translations.da: Vores børn besøger deres bedstefar i morgen.
translations.ja: 私たちの子どもたちは明日祖父を訪ねます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person plural), plural form; modifies 'enfants'.
Common noun, plural; subject of 'visitent'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; transitive, takes direct object 'leur grand-père'.
Possessive determiner (3rd person plural possessor), used before a singular noun; modifies 'grand-père'.
Common noun; direct object of 'visitent'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb phrase.

sentences.target: Son grand-père lit sur le banc.
sentences.reading: /sɔ̃ ɡʁɑ̃ pɛʁ li syʁ lə bɑ̃/

translations.fr: Son grand-père lit sur le banc.
translations.ipa: /sɔ̃ ɡʁɑ̃ pɛʁ li syʁ lə bɑ̃/
translations.en: Her grandfather is reading on the bench.
translations.es: Su abuelo está leyendo en el banco.
translations.de: Ihr Großvater liest auf der Bank.
translations.it: Suo nonno sta leggendo sulla panchina.
translations.ko: 그녀의 할아버지는 벤치에서 책을 읽고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她的爷爷在长椅上看书。
translations.yue: 佢阿爺喺長櫈上面睇書。
translations.pt: O avô dela está lendo no banco.
translations.vi: Ông của cô ấy đang đọc sách trên ghế băng.
translations.nl: Haar opa leest op het bankje.
translations.hi: उसके दादाजी बेंच पर पढ़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ο παππούς της διαβάζει στο παγκάκι.
translations.sv: Hennes morfar sitter på bänken och läser.
translations.ja: 彼女の祖父はベンチで本を読んでいます。

Definite article, masculine singular; modifies 'banc'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'sur'.
